description.value:
Starting at 1st level, you gain access to an A.I. companion called a Pod, a small automaton that comes standard issue with YoRHa units. You can see through the sensors of this companion normally as if you were not blinded. It utilizes the statistics of the summon that can be found here.

It follows the exact same progression as a standard summon. However, Pods assigned to members of the clan work much more effectively due to their synergistic nature. Your Pod shares your level, is proficient in all saving throws, and has half proficiency in all skills it is not proficient in. Each time your Pod gains a level, they gain an additional amount of hit points equal to half of your proficiency bonus. When you would gain an ability score improvement from your class, your Pod increases one of its ability scores by +2, or two of the scores by +1. It gains a bonus to its AC equal to its Constitution modifier and can hover, unlike others of its kind. The Pod regains its lost jutsu slots on a long rest. When it would expend all of its jutsu slots, it does not vanish or unsummon as normal summoned creatures usually do.

As an object interaction, you can attach yourself to the Pod to use its movement speed in place of your own until the start of your next turn. If the Pod is ever destroyed, you can rebuild it by spending 1 chakra die over the course of a short rest. However, this does not replenish any of its jutsu slots.

You can use your Pod to assist you in making a weapon or Taijutsu attack, or performing an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma skill-based action, granting you 1d4 to the attack roll or skill check. You may do this a number of times per turn equal to half of your proficiency bonus, but if you use your Pod in this way, you cannot command it as a bonus action until the start of your next turn.

The bonus provided increases to 1d6 at 11th level and 1d8 at 18th level.
